title: Mildly Smoky Thai Papaya Som Tum
description: A sour and crunchy Thai dish featuring turmeric and smoked flavors, made with paleo-friendly ingredients, this som tum is a romantic and delicious meal option.

ingredients.name: green papaya
ingredients.notes: use a food processor to shred

instructions: In a large mortar and pestle, pound the smoked chili peppers into a coarse paste.
Add the turmeric, fish sauce, lime juice, and salt to the mortar and pestle and mix well.
Add the shredded green papaya to the mortar and pestle and pound until well combined.
Stir in the chopped peanuts, diced tomatoes, and sliced cucumber.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the som tum cold, garnished with additional peanuts and tomatoes if desired.
